Has the covenant of the Book not been taken upon them, (namely) that they should not say about God (anything) but the truth? And have they (not) studied what is in it? The Home of the Hereafter is better for the ones who guard (themselves). Will you not understand?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا اَ۬لۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمۡ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّيثَٰقُ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى اَ۬للَّهِ إِلَّا اَ۬لۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۗ وَاَلدَّارُ اُ۬لۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۗ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will they not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ  يَاخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا اَ۬لۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَر لَّنَا وَإِن  يَاتِهِمۡ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَاخُذُوهُۚ أَلَمۡ يُوخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّيثَٰقُ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ  أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى اَ۬للَّهِ إِلَّا اَ۬لۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۗ وَاَلدَّارُ اُ۬لۡأٓخِرَةُ  خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will they not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمۡ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّيثَٰقُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۗ وَٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will they not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمۡ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّيثَٰقُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۗ وَٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will you not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمُۥ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمُۥ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۥۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِيثَٰقُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۦۗ وَٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will they not reason?

canonical_variants.arabic: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمُۥ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمُۥ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۥۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ مِيثَٰقُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۦۗ وَٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will they not reason?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُمَسِّكُونَ بِٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ إِنَّا لَا نُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُصْلِحِينَ
verses.text: Those who hold fast the Book and observe the prayer – surely We do not let the reward of those who set (things) right go to waste.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُمۡسِكُونَ بِٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ إِنَّا لَا نُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُصۡلِحِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who adhere to the Scripture and have established the prayer—indeed, We do not waste the reward of the reformers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُمَسِّكُونَ بِٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ إِنَّا لَا نُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ ٱلۡمُصۡلِحِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who adhere strictly to the Scripture and have established the prayer—indeed, We do not waste the reward of the reformers.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِذْ نَتَقْنَا ٱلْجَبَلَ فَوْقَهُمْ كَأَنَّهُۥ ظُلَّةٌۭ وَظَنُّوٓا۟ أَنَّهُۥ وَاقِعٌۢ بِهِمْ خُذُوا۟ مَآ ءَاتَيْنَٰكُم بِقُوَّةٍۢ وَٱذْكُرُوا۟ مَا فِيهِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We shook the mountain above them, as if it were a canopy, and they thought it was going to fall on them: ‘Hold fast what We have given you, and remember what is in it, so that you may guard (yourselves).’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ مِن ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَأَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ ۛ شَهِدْنَآ ۛ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنْ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord took from the sons of Adam – from their loins – their descendants, and made them bear witness about themselves: ‘Am I not your Lord?’ They said, ‘Yes indeed! We bear witness.’ (We did that) so that you would not say on the Day of Resurrection, ‘Surely we were oblivious of this,’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ مِن ظُهُورِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَأَشۡهَدَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ أَلَسۡتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ شَهِدۡنَآۚ أَن يَقُولُواْ يَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنۡ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when Your Lord summoned the offspring(s) of the children of Adam from their loins and made them testify about themselves, “Am I not your Lord?” They said, “Yes, we do testify.” Thus they cannot say on the Day of Resurrection, “We were oblivious of this.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِي ءَادَم مِّن ظُهُورِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَأَشۡهَدَهُمۡ  عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِهِمۡ أَلَسۡتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ شَهِدۡنَاۚ أَن يَقُولُواْ يَوۡمَ  اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنۡ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when Your Lord summoned the offspring(s) of the children of Adam from their loins and made them testify about themselves, “Am I not your Lord?” They said, “Yes, we do testify.” Thus they cannot say on the Day of Resurrection, “We were oblivious of this.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِے ءَادَمَ مِن ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَأَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِهِمْ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰۖ شَهِدْنَا أَن تَقُولُواْ يَوْمَ اَ۬لْقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنْ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when Your Lord summoned the offspring(s) of the children of Adam from their loins and made them testify about themselves, “Am I not your Lord?” They said, “Yes, we do testify.” Thus you cannot say on the Day of Resurrection, “We were oblivious of this.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذَ اَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِےٓ ءَادَمَ مِن ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَأَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمُۥٓ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قَالُواْ بَل۪ىٰۖ شَهِدْنَآ أَن تَقُولُواْ يَوْمَ اَ۬لْقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنْ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when Your Lord summoned the offspring(s) of the children of Adam from their loins and made them testify about themselves, “Am I not your Lord?” They said, “Yes, we do testify.” Thus you cannot say on the Day of Resurrection, “We were oblivious of this.”

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ تَقُولُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَشْرَكَ ءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ وَكُنَّا ذُرِّيَّةًۭ مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ ۖ أَفَتُهْلِكُنَا بِمَا فَعَلَ ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
verses.text: or say, ‘Our fathers were idolaters before (us), and we are descendants after them. Will You destroy us for what the perpetrators of falsehood did?’

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوۡ يَقُولُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَشۡرَكَ ءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ وَكُنَّا ذُرِّيَّةٗ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡۖ أَفَتُهۡلِكُنَا بِمَا فَعَلَ اَ۬لۡمُبۡطِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Nor can they say, “Our forefathers practiced polytheism before, and we were their offspring who came after them. Will you annihilate us for what the advocates of falsehood did?”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوۡ يَقُولُواْ إِنَّمَا أَشۡرَكَ  ءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ وَكُنَّا ذُرِّيَّةٗ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡۖ أَفَتُهۡلِكُنَا  بِمَا فَعَلَ اَ۬لۡمُبۡطِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Nor can they say, “Our forefathers practiced polytheism before, and we were their offspring who came after them. Will you annihilate us for what the advocates of falsehood did?”

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ وَلَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: In this way We make the signs distinct, so that they will return.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَٱنسَلَخَ مِنْهَا فَأَتْبَعَهُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
verses.text: Recite to them the story of the one to whom We gave Our signs, but he passed them by, and Satan followed him, and he became one of those who are in error.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَرَفَعْنَٰهُ بِهَا وَلَٰكِنَّهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ ۚ فَمَثَلُهُۥ كَمَثَلِ ٱلْكَلْبِ إِن تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْهِ يَلْهَثْ أَوْ تَتْرُكْهُ يَلْهَث ۚ ذَّٰلِكَ مَثَلُ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا ۚ فَٱقْصُصِ ٱلْقَصَصَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: If We had (so) pleased, We would indeed have raised him by it, but he clung to the earth and followed his (vain) desire. So his parable is like the parable of the dog: If you attack it, it lolls its tongue out, or if you leave it alone, it (still) lolls its tongue out. That is the parable of the people who called Our signs a lie. So recount the account, that they may reflect.

verses.quran_arabic: سَآءَ مَثَلًا ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَأَنفُسَهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يَظْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Evil is the parable of the people who called Our signs a lie, but (who only) did themselves evil.

verses.quran_arabic: مَن يَهْدِ ٱللَّهُ فَهُوَ ٱلْمُهْتَدِى ۖ وَمَن يُضْلِلْ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: Whoever God guides is the (rightly) guided one, and whoever He leads astray, those – they are the losers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ذَرَأْنَا لِجَهَنَّمَ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ ۖ لَهُمْ قُلُوبٌۭ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ بِهَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْيُنٌۭ لَّا يُبْصِرُونَ بِهَا وَلَهُمْ ءَاذَانٌۭ لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ بِهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ كَٱلْأَنْعَٰمِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْغَٰفِلُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We have created for Gehenna many of the jinn and humans: they have hearts, but they do not understand with them; they have eyes, but they do not see with them; they have ears, but they do not hear with them. Those (people) are like cattle – No! They are (even) farther astray! Those – they are the oblivious.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ فَٱدْعُوهُ بِهَا ۖ وَذَرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ يُلْحِدُونَ فِىٓ أَسْمَٰٓئِهِۦ ۚ سَيُجْزَوْنَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: To God (belong) the best names. So call on Him with them, and leave those who pervert His names. They will be repaid for what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِمَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ أُمَّةٌۭ يَهْدُونَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَبِهِۦ يَعْدِلُونَ
verses.text: Among those whom We have created is a community which guides by the truth and by means of it acts fairly.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: But those who call Our signs a lie – We shall lead them on step by step without their realizing it,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
verses.text: and I shall spare them – surely My plan is strong.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَتَفَكَّرُوا۟ ۗ مَا بِصَاحِبِهِم مِّن جِنَّةٍ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Do they not reflect? Their companion is not possessed. He is only a clear warner.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَنظُرُوا۟ فِى مَلَكُوتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍۢ وَأَنْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ قَدِ ٱقْتَرَبَ أَجَلُهُمْ ۖ فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they not look into the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and whatever things God has created, and that it may be that their time has already drawn near? So in what (kind of) proclamation will they believe after this?

verses.quran_arabic: مَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا هَادِىَ لَهُۥ ۚ وَيَذَرُهُمْ فِى طُغْيَٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: Whoever God leads astray has no guide. He leaves them in their insolent transgression, wandering blindly.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۚ وَنَذَرُهُمُۥ فِي طُغۡيَٰنِهِمُۥ يَعۡمَهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whomever Allah leads astray has no guide, and We leave them to wander aimlessly while exceeding all limits.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۚ وَنَذَرُهُمُۥ فِي طُغۡيَٰنِهِمُۥ يَعۡمَهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whomever Allah leads astray has no guide, and We leave them to wander aimlessly while exceeding all limits.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَنْ يُّضْلِلِ اِ۬للَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۖ وَنَذَرُهُمْ فِے طُغْيَٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Whomever Allah leads astray has no guide, and We leave them to wander aimlessly while exceeding all limits.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَنْ يُّضْلِلِ اِ۬للَّهُ فَلَا هَادِيَ لَهُۥۖ وَنَذَرُهُمْ فِے طُغْيَٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Whomever Allah leads astray has no guide, and We leave them to wander aimlessly while exceeding all limits.

verses.quran_arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا ۖ قُلْ إِنَّمَا عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى ۖ لَا يُجَلِّيهَا لِوَقْتِهَآ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ ثَقُلَتْ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَا تَأْتِيكُمْ إِلَّا بَغْتَةًۭ ۗ يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ كَأَنَّكَ حَفِىٌّ عَنْهَا ۖ قُلْ إِنَّمَا عِلْمُهَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: They ask you about the Hour: ‘When is its arrival?’ Say: ‘Knowledge of it is only with my Lord. No (one) will reveal it at its (appointed) time but He. It is heavy in the heavens and the earth, (but) it will only come upon you unexpectedly.’ They ask you as if you are well informed about it. Say: ‘Knowledge of it is only with God, but most of the people do not know (it).’

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لَّآ أَمْلِكُ لِنَفْسِى نَفْعًۭا وَلَا ضَرًّا إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَلَوْ كُنتُ أَعْلَمُ ٱلْغَيْبَ لَٱسْتَكْثَرْتُ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ وَمَا مَسَّنِىَ ٱلسُّوٓءُ ۚ إِنْ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌۭ وَبَشِيرٌۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘I have no power to (cause) myself benefit or harm, except for whatever God pleases. If I had knowledge of the unseen, I would indeed have acquired much good, and evil would not have touched me. I am only a warner and bringer of good news to a people who believe.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍۢ وَجَعَلَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا لِيَسْكُنَ إِلَيْهَا ۖ فَلَمَّا تَغَشَّىٰهَا حَمَلَتْ حَمْلًا خَفِيفًۭا فَمَرَّتْ بِهِۦ ۖ فَلَمَّآ أَثْقَلَت دَّعَوَا ٱللَّهَ رَبَّهُمَا لَئِنْ ءَاتَيْتَنَا صَٰلِحًۭا لَّنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ
verses.text: He (it is) who created you from one person, and made from him his spouse, so that he might dwell with her. And when he covered her, she bore a light burden and passed on with it (unnoticed). But when she became heavy, they both called on God their Lord, ‘If indeed You give us a righteous (son), we shall indeed be among the thankful.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُمَا صَٰلِحًۭا جَعَلَا لَهُۥ شُرَكَآءَ فِيمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمَا ۚ فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: But when He gave them a righteous (son), they set up associates for Him in (return for) what He had given them. Yet God is exalted above what they associate.

verses.quran_arabic: أَيُشْرِكُونَ مَا لَا يَخْلُقُ شَيْـًۭٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ
verses.text: Do they associate (with Him) what does not create anything, since they are (themselves) created?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ لَهُمْ نَصْرًۭا وَلَآ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَنصُرُونَ
verses.text: They cannot (give) them any help, nor can they (even) help themselves.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن تَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰ لَا يَتَّبِعُوكُمْ ۚ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ أَدَعَوْتُمُوهُمْ أَمْ أَنتُمْ صَٰمِتُونَ
verses.text: If you call them to the guidance, they will not follow you. (It is) the same for you whether you call them or you remain silent.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ عِبَادٌ أَمْثَالُكُمْ ۖ فَٱدْعُوهُمْ فَلْيَسْتَجِيبُوا۟ لَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Surely those you call on instead of God are servants like you. So call on them and let them respond to you, if you are truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَهُمْ أَرْجُلٌۭ يَمْشُونَ بِهَآ ۖ أَمْ لَهُمْ أَيْدٍۢ يَبْطِشُونَ بِهَآ ۖ أَمْ لَهُمْ أَعْيُنٌۭ يُبْصِرُونَ بِهَآ ۖ أَمْ لَهُمْ ءَاذَانٌۭ يَسْمَعُونَ بِهَا ۗ قُلِ ٱدْعُوا۟ شُرَكَآءَكُمْ ثُمَّ كِيدُونِ فَلَا تُنظِرُونِ
verses.text: Do they have feet with which they walk, or do they have hands with which they grasp, or do they have eyes with which they see, or do they have ears with which they hear? Say: ‘Call on your associates, (and) then plot against me and do not spare me!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ وَلِۦِّىَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۖ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: Surely my ally is God, who has sent down the Book. He takes the righteous as allies.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَكُمْ وَلَآ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَنصُرُونَ
verses.text: Those you call on instead of Him cannot help you, nor can they (even) help themselves.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن تَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰ لَا يَسْمَعُوا۟ ۖ وَتَرَىٰهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَيْكَ وَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: If you call them to the guidance, they do not hear. You see them looking at you, but they do not see.

verses.quran_arabic: خُذِ ٱلْعَفْوَ وَأْمُرْ بِٱلْعُرْفِ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْجَٰهِلِينَ
verses.text: Take the excess, and command what is right, and turn away from the ignorant.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِمَّا يَنزَغَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ نَزْغٌۭ فَٱسْتَعِذْ بِٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: If any provocation from Satan provokes you, take refuge with God. Surely He is hearing, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ إِذَا مَسَّهُمْ طَٰٓئِفٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ تَذَكَّرُوا۟ فَإِذَا هُم مُّبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Surely the ones who guard (themselves), when a circler from Satan touches them, remember, and suddenly they see (clearly).

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِخْوَٰنُهُمْ يَمُدُّونَهُمْ فِى ٱلْغَىِّ ثُمَّ لَا يُقْصِرُونَ
verses.text: But their brothers increase them in error, (and) then they do not stop.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا لَمْ تَأْتِهِم بِـَٔايَةٍۢ قَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا ٱجْتَبَيْتَهَا ۚ قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَتَّبِعُ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ مِن رَّبِّى ۚ هَٰذَا بَصَآئِرُ مِن رَّبِّكُمْ وَهُدًۭى وَرَحْمَةٌۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: When you do not bring them a sign, they say, ‘If only you would choose (to do) it.’ Say: ‘I only follow what I am inspired (with) from my Lord. This is evidence from your Lord, and a guidance and mercy for a people who believe.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ فَٱسْتَمِعُوا۟ لَهُۥ وَأَنصِتُوا۟ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: When the Qur’ān is recited, listen to it and remain silent, so that you may receive compassion.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱذْكُر رَّبَّكَ فِى نَفْسِكَ تَضَرُّعًۭا وَخِيفَةًۭ وَدُونَ ٱلْجَهْرِ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ بِٱلْغُدُوِّ وَٱلْءَاصَالِ وَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْغَٰفِلِينَ
verses.text: Remember your Lord within yourself, in humility and in fear, and without loud words, in the mornings and the evenings. Do not be one of the oblivious.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَيُسَبِّحُونَهُۥ وَلَهُۥ يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
verses.text: Surely those who are with your Lord are not too proud to serve Him. They glorify Him and prostrate themselves before Him.
